raw_consumer_statement: Hello please see the attached file it is specific in detail of our complaint against XXXX XXXX to the D O T we disputed it with Barclays credit card, and they ruled against us I can provide detailed invoices to back up our claims we were charged 2 times for the same product and wrongly charged for a service that does not work. again please see the attached documents for the complete information please contact me for any other information needed at XXXX cell Thank you XXXX XXXX
